text: Content is tired, cliche, uncreative under AI slop. In the odd rare chance of a great movie, they have encrapified so severely that users will go months paying for an odd co-dependent expectation for another when they can just one time rent on Amazon or Itunes. Netflix is not the future, it is so 2015. If Netflix ceased to exist, half of users quickly find a lazy replacement, the other half, find a revelatory liberation.

If you watch on Google pixel, you cannot control brightness through the app. There's a brightness slider, yes, but the brightness always remains at the same height. It overrides the phone brightness and extra dim settings as well, meaning that the app is constantly flash banging you with brightness while streaming. The only solution that many have found is to uninstall the app every time they make the mistake of touching the brightness slider in-app, as this resets it to phone brightness setting
